name: vocab-voyage
description: Vocabulary tools for ISEE, SSAT, SAT, PSAT, GRE, GMAT, and LSAT prep — 20 tools and 17 interactive widgets (Word of the Day, flashcards, quiz, study plan, progress, 11 mini-games, session debrief) with lifecycle-aware Sparkle guidance.

bearer.description: Optional. Pass a personal MCP token (vv_mcp_…) generated at https://vocab.voyage/mcp to unlock personalized tools.
bearer.rotation: Generate a new token at https://vocab.voyage/mcp, deploy, then revoke the previous one.
bearer.revocation: Open https://vocab.voyage/mcp and click Revoke. Immediate.

scopes.name: mcp.read
scopes.description: Read MCP metadata and public tool results. Required for any MCP usage.

scopes.name: mcp.tools
scopes.description: Invoke public MCP tools (definition, quiz, courses, study plan). Required to call tools.

scopes.name: profile.read
scopes.description: Read connected user's display name, account type, and preferred course.

scopes.name: progress.read
scopes.description: Read mastery, streaks, and recent sessions for the connected user.

error_codes.meaning: Personalized tool called without a vv_mcp_ token.
Token missing required scope. Response includes required_scopes array.
Token has been revoked or expired. Generate a new one at /mcp.

tools.name: get_word_of_the_day
tools.description: Returns today's vocabulary Word of the Day, optionally scoped to a test family.

tools.name: get_definition
tools.description: Look up the definition, part of speech, example sentence, and synonyms/antonyms for a word.

_meta.ui.widgetDescription: Definition card with examples and synonyms.

tools.name: generate_quiz
tools.description: Generate a multiple-choice vocabulary quiz for a test family (1–10 questions).

tools.name: get_course_word_list
tools.description: Get a sample of vocabulary words from a specific Vocab Voyage course.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: Lists all 13 Vocab Voyage courses with their slugs and descriptions.

tools.name: explain_word_in_context
tools.description: Explain what a word means inside a specific sentence.

tools.name: study_plan_preview
tools.description: Returns a sample 7-day study plan (5 words/day) for a given test family.

tools.name: get_flashcards
tools.description: Returns a tap-to-flip flashcard deck. Per-card answers persist via record_word_result.

tools.name: get_my_progress
tools.description: Auth-only personal dashboard: streak, XP, mastery split, next-up words, recent misses.

tools.name: play_game
tools.description: Launches one of 11 vocabulary mini-games (word_match, spelling_bee, speed_round, synonym_showdown, word_scramble, fill_in_blank, context_clues, word_guess, picture_match, crossword, word_search). Per-answer events flow to record_word_result; round XP via award_game_xp.

tools.name: get_sparkle_guidance
tools.description: Lifecycle-aware coaching: returns a phase-appropriate greeting (16 phases) and a recommended next tool/action. Renders the session-debrief widget when relevant.

_meta.ui.widgetDescription: Sparkle's session debrief and next-action card.

tools.name: set_persona
tools.description: Switch agent bias between student, parent, tutor, or explorer.

tools.name: get_recommended_next_action
tools.description: Returns a one-line recommendation for what the user should do next.

tools.name: list_starter_prompts
tools.description: Lists the 6 MCP prompts (vocab_kickoff, test_prep_quiz, session_debrief, …) for hosts that don't surface prompts/list.

tools.name: record_word_result
tools.description: Auth: log a per-card answer (correct or incorrect).

tools.name: record_session_complete
tools.description: Auth: log session totals and award XP.

tools.name: award_game_xp
tools.description: Auth: grant bonus XP from a completed mini-game round.

tools.name: mark_word_known
tools.description: Auth: add a word to the user's queue or mastered list.

tools.name: mark_word_difficult
tools.description: Auth: flag a word as needing more review.

tools.name: update_adaptive_level
tools.description: Auth: adjust the user's adaptive difficulty floor/ceiling.
